hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'dev-team: jq is required for the SessionStart hook (brew install jq / apt install jq) — orchestration.md was not loaded this session.' >&2; exit 0; }; jq -n --rawfile content "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/orchestration.md" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:$content}}'
